ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's marital status */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "num_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's highest level of education */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's occupation */,
  "home_owner" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer owns a home */,
  "num_cars" INTEGER /* Number of cars the customer owns */,
  "commute_distance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's commute distance */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's region */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "age_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's age bracket */,
  "purchased_bike" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer has purchased a bike */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_status" TEXT /* Loyalty program status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_status ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupation ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_age_bracket_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_bracket_id") REFERENCES age_bracket ("age_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES region ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_commute_distance_id FOREIGN KEY ("commute_distance_id") REFERENCES commute_distance ("commute_distance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married, Single) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, Partial College) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of education (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Ph.D.) */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field of education (e.g., Engineering, Business, Arts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Professional, Clerical) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of occupation (e.g., Technology, Finance, Healthcare) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of occupation (e.g., Software Engineer, Financial Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commute_distance" (
  "commute_distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commute distance */,
  "distance_name" TEXT /* Name of the commute distance (e.g., 0-1 Miles, 2-5 Miles) */,
  "distance_in_miles" REAL /* Exact distance in miles for each commute distance option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commute_distance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe, Pacific) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for each region */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for each region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_bracket" (
  "age_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age bracket */,
  "bracket_name" TEXT /* Name of the age bracket (e.g., Young, Middle Age) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for each age bracket */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for each age bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  "product_reviews" TEXT /* Customer reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Bikes, Accessories) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction (e.g., inquiry, complaint, feedback) */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the interaction (e.g., phone, email, social media) */,
  "interaction_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the interaction (e.g., resolved, pending, escalated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., Inquiry, Complaint, Feedback) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the campaign */,
  "target_audience_segment" TEXT /* Target audience segment for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_campaigns" (
  "customer_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer campaign participation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer participating in the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response of the customer (e.g., Opened Email, Clicked Link, Purchased) */,
  "campaign_response_date" TEXT /* Date of response */,
  "campaign_conversion" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer converted (e.g., made a purchase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of points required to qualify for the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the loyalty program */,
  "program_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer loyalty program participation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer participating in the loyalty program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the customer */,
  "rewards_claimed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer has claimed any rewards */,
  "loyalty_points_balance" INTEGER /* Current loyalty points balance */,
  "loyalty_tier" TEXT /* Loyalty tier (e.g., silver, gold, platinum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Sales Representative, Marketing Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
